creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
The following options combination:

ACL_SUPPORT AIO_SUPPORT AVAHI CUPS EXP_MODULES FAM GSSAPI_NONE NLS POPT PTHREADPOOL SWAT SYSLOG UTMP WINBIND

results in a compile-time errors stemming from a variety of LDAP_* defines being, well, undefined.

Disabling EXP_MODULES helps -- the port should be doing this automatically and/or advise the user of problem.
